items.name: Crimson Rose Noble Coat [PBR]
items.description:
🌹🖤 Elegance with a Dark Edge 🖤🌹
Step into the spotlight with the Crimson Rose Noble Coat, a masterpiece of aristocratic fashion. Crafted in deep black with crimson floral embroidery and golden buttons, this coat radiates sophistication with a hint of mystery. Perfect for noble gatherings, masquerades, or gothic fantasy roleplay.
💡 Why You’ll Love It
Detailed red floral embroidery for a striking look
Golden accents & buttons for noble refinement
PBR materials for realistic depth and shine
Perfect for royalty, vampire, or gothic roleplay themes
🔍 Keywords: noble coat, gothic fashion, vampire outfit, aristocrat attire, crimson rose jacket, Roblox PBR clothing, dark elegance
✨ A coat that whispers of roses, shadows, and untold stories.
